languages.text: "Ты сильнее этого. Боль, которая затмевает твой разум, лишь испытание, которое тебе вполне по силам. Сложи оружие, и, даю слово, медикарии избавят тебя от нее".

"You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial, one you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."
languages.original_text: "Ты сильнее этого. Боль, которая затмевает твой разум, лишь испытание, которое тебе вполне по силам. Сложи оружие, и, даю слово, медикарии избавят тебя от нее".

traits.locale_text: "You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."

"You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."

"You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial, one you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."

"You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial, one you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."

languages.text: "Ihr seid stärker als Ihr denkt. Der Schmerz, der Euren Verstand trübt, ist nur eine Prüfung, der Ihr mehr als gewachsen seid. Legt Eure Waffen nieder, und ich verspreche Euch, die Medicae-Offiziere werden Euren Schmerz lindern."
languages.original_text: "You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial, one you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid stärker als Ihr denkt. Der Schmerz, der Euren Verstand trübt, ist nur eine Prüfung, der Ihr mehr als gewachsen seid. Legt Eure Waffen nieder, und ich verspreche Euch, die Medicae-Offiziere werden Euren Schmerz lindern."

languages.text: « Vous êtes plus fort que ça. La douleur qui obscurcit votre esprit n'est qu'une épreuve que vous êtes largement capable de surmonter. Déposez vos armes, et je vous promets que les officiers de medicae soulageront vos souffrances. »
languages.original_text: "You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial, one you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes plus fort que ça. La douleur qui obscurcit votre esprit n'est qu'une épreuve que vous êtes largement capable de surmonter. Déposez vos armes, et je vous promets que les officiers de medicae soulageront vos souffrances. »

languages.text: “你很坚强。蒙蔽你心智的痛苦不过是一场试炼，你完全有能力克服。放下武器，我保证医务官会减轻你的痛苦。”
languages.original_text: "You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial, one you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."

traits.locale_text: “你很坚强。蒙蔽你心智的痛苦不过是一场试炼，你完全有能力克服。放下武器，我保证医务官会减轻你的痛苦。”

languages.text: «Es más fuerte que todo esto. El dolor que nubla su mente es solo una prueba, que es perfectamente capaz de superar. Baje el arma y prometo que los oficiales medicae aliviarán su sufrimiento».
languages.original_text: "You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial, one you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."

traits.locale_text: «Es más fuerte que todo esto. El dolor que nubla su mente es solo una prueba, que es perfectamente capaz de superar. Baje el arma y prometo que los oficiales medicae aliviarán su sufrimiento».

languages.text: 「あなたはもっと強い。あなたの心を曇らせている痛みは、あなたが乗り越えることのできる試練にすぎない。武器を捨てなさい。そうすれば、医務官があなたの苦しみを和らげてくれると約束します」
languages.original_text: "You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial, one you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたはもっと強い。あなたの心を曇らせている痛みは、あなたが乗り越えることのできる試練にすぎない。武器を捨てなさい。そうすれば、医務官があなたの苦しみを和らげてくれると約束します」

languages.text: "Bundan daha güçlüsün. Zihnini bulandıran bu acı sadece bir sınav, senin fazlasıyla üstesinden gelebileceğin türden bir sınav. Silahlarını bırak, söz veriyorum sıhhiye subayları acını dindirecek."
languages.original_text: "You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial, one you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."

traits.locale_text: "Bundan daha güçlüsün. Zihnini bulandıran bu acı sadece bir sınav, senin fazlasıyla üstesinden gelebileceğin türden bir sınav. Silahlarını bırak, söz veriyorum sıhhiye subayları acını dindirecek."
